channel.title: Rstat on Rhyeu's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Rstat on Rhyeu's blog

item.title: Multinomial classification with tidymodels and volcano eruption
item.description: reference : https://juliasilge.com/blog/multinomial-volcano-eruptions/ # install.packages("maps") library(knitr) knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = T, warning = F, message = F, echo = T, dpi = 180, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5) library(tidyverse) ## -- Attaching packages ------------------------------------------------------- tidyverse 1.3.0 -- ## √ ggplot2 3.3.2 √ purrr 0.3.4 ## √ tibble 3.0.3 √ dplyr 1.0.2 ## √ tidyr 1.1.2 √ stringr 1.4.0 ## √ readr 1.3.1 √ forcats 0.5.0 ## -- Conflicts ---------------------------------------------------------- tidyverse_conflicts() --
